Freetime F-Droid Repo

The official F-Droid repository by Freetime Maker. Providing the latest versions of apps like GeoWeather and SuperSMP Companion. Updates are published here directly and are often available much faster than in the main F-Droid Repository.

Currently it serves 3 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FreetimeMaker/fdroid/main/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
52 5A AD 9B 34 6F 70 38 8D 96 E2 81 C0 61 BC 18 4B 5A FE C3 58 72 BF 1E 14 0A D8 06 3C C2 A1 C2
